zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley於1358年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾哈特利 卡素時，他的父親John de Ferrers 4th Baron Ferrers of Chartley27歲，母親Elizabeth Stafford21歲。他於1385年與Margaret Despenser在英國斯塔福爾哈特利 霍爾梅結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1367年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾哈特利 卡素被列為5th baron ferrers of chartley。他去世於大約1413年3月13日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯度維-比-哈特利享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾梅列瓦列。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley于1358年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾哈特利 卡素时，他的父亲John de Ferrers 4th Baron Ferrers of Chartley27岁，母亲Elizabeth Stafford21岁。他于1385年与Margaret Despenser在英国斯塔福爾哈特利 霍爾梅结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1367年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾哈特利 卡素被列为5th baron ferrers of chartley。他去世于大约1413年3月13日在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯度維-比-哈特利享年55岁，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾梅列瓦列。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley was born in 1358, in Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Ferrers 4th Baron Ferrers of Chartley, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth Stafford, was 21. He married Margaret Despenser in 1385, in Chartley Holme, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. In 1367, at the age of 9, his occupation is listed as 5th baron ferrers of chartley in Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. He died about 13 March 1413, in Stowe-by-Chartley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55, and was buried in Merevale, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley est né en 1358, à Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Ferrers 4th Baron Ferrers of Chartley, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Stafford, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Despenser en 1385, à Chartley Holme, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. En 1367, à l’âge de 9 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est 5th baron ferrers of chartley à Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé environ 13 mars 1413, à Stowe-by-Chartley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Merevale, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley 1358 in Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Ferrers 4th Baron Ferrers of Chartley 27 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Stafford 21. Er hat 1385 in Chartley Holme, Staffordshire, England Margaret Despenser geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1367, als er 9 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als 5th baron ferrers of chartley in Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb um 13. März 1413 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Stowe-by-Chartley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Merevale, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley è nato il nel 1358 nel Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Ferrers 4th Baron Ferrers of Chartley, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Stafford, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Despenser nel 1385, nel Chartley Holme, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Nel 1367, all'età di 9 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come 5th baron ferrers of chartley nel Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì circa 13 marzo 1413, nel Stowe-by-Chartley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Merevale, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartleyが1358年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアチャートリー カストルで生まれた時，父John de Ferrers 4th Baron Ferrers of Chartleyは27歳，母Elizabeth Staffordは21歳であった。1385年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアチャートリー ホールメでMargaret Despenserと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1367年，9歳の時，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアチャートリー カストルでの職業は5th baron ferrers of chartleyと記録されている。彼は約1413年3月13日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアストウエ-ブイ-チャートリーで55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアメレベルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley(이)가 1358년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 처틀리 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Ferrers 4th Baron Ferrers of Chartley(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Stafford(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1385년 영국 스태퍼드실르 처틀리 홀에서 Margaret Despenser(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1367년, 9세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 처틀리 카스틀에서 5th baron ferrers of chartley이었다. 그는 대략 1413년 3월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스타우-비-처틀리에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 머에발에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley nasceu em 1358, em Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Ferrers 4th Baron Ferrers of Chartley, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Stafford, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Despenser em 1385, em Chartley Holme, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Em 1367, com 9 anos, sua profissão aparece como 5th baron ferrers of chartley em Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 13 de março de 1413, em Stowe-by-Chartley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Merevale, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley родился в 1358 г. в местности чартли кастл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Ferrers 4th Baron Ferrers of Chartley было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Stafford, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Despenser в 1385 г. в местности чартли холм, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. В 1367 году, в возрасте 9 лет,  он работал по профессии 5th baron ferrers of chartley в местности чартли кастл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер около 13 марта 1413 г. в местности стоуе-би-чартли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности миревеил, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Ferrers 5th Baron Ferrers of Chartley nació en 1358, en Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Ferrers 4th Baron Ferrers of Chartley, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Stafford, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Margaret Despenser en 1385, en Chartley Holme, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. En 1367, a la edad de 9 años, su ocupación registrada era 5th baron ferrers of chartley en Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió aproximadamente 13 de marzo de 1413, en Stowe-by-Chartley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Merevale, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
